user.title: Connect to your Voltie Charger
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your charger on the local network. Username and password are only required if you have enabled HTTP authentication in the mobile app.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Voltie Charger
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for this charger.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Voltie Charger discovered
zeroconf_confirm.description: Do you want to add the charger at {host} to Home Assistant?

discovery_auth.title: Authenticate with the discovered charger
discovery_auth.description: The charger at {host} requires a username and password.

api_disabled.title: HTTP API is disabled on this charger
api_disabled.description: The charger at **{host}** is visible on your network, but its HTTP API is turned off. Enable it in the Voltie mobile app under **Settings → Advanced Settings → Experimental → HTTP API config**, then press Retry.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the charger. Check the host and that the charger is on the network.
error.invalid_auth: The charger rejected the username or password.
error.incomplete_credentials: Provide both a username and a password, or leave both blank for no authentication.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the logs for details.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the charger at the given address.
abort.wrong_charger: The charger at this address has a different ID than the one configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to query the charger. Lower values update faster but increase load on the charger.
